title: Common Pitfalls and Solutions Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on common database relationship pitfalls and their established solutions.

questions.question: What is the N+1 query problem primarily related to?
options: A common ORM pitfall where many separate queries are made for related data

questions.question: Which of these is the most effective solution to fix the N+1 query problem?
options: Implementing Eager Loading (like include or populate)

questions.question: What is a major symptom of 'Over-Normalization' in a database schema?
options: Excessively complex and slow queries due to too many JOINs

questions.question: Which issue occurs when Table A depends on Table B, and Table B also depends on Table A?
